channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Biden accuses Trump of corruption, then has trouble leaving stage
item.description: Former President Joe Biden criticized President Trump for corruption at a Maryland Democratic rally, but later struggled to exit the stage.

item.title: Energy Sector Seeks Stable Permitting Rules
item.description: Industry growth is hindered by a permitting system subject to political whims.

item.title: Trump Visits Key Sites for D.C. Revamp Plan
item.description: President Trump toured two locations on Sunday that are part of his vision for reshaping the capital.

item.title: Sen. Kelly Criticizes Biden's Border Policy
item.description: Sen. Mark Kelly sharply criticized former President Biden's border management, stating it created a crisis.
